## Calculate ADRF all counties -\> make a plot:

```{r}
county_DRF_to_ADRF = function(DRF_list, dataset) {
  county_ADRF_list = list()
  
  # Get county populations (single value per county)
  county_pops = dataset %>% select(NAME,date,Total_Pop) 
  
  for (i in counties) {
    ADRF = data.frame(Z = dose_grid, mu_hat = NA, weighted_mu_hat = NA, 
                      rate_hat = NA, weighted_rate_hat = NA)
    
    for (j in 1:length(DRF_list)) {
      county_preds = DRF_list[[j]] %>% filter(county == i)
      
      # Skip if no predictions for this county
      if (nrow(county_preds) == 0) next
      
      # Merge with time-specific populations
      county_preds_pop = county_preds %>%
        left_join(county_pops, by = c("county" = "NAME", "date" = "date"))
      
      # Population-weighted mean across time periods
      total_pop = sum(county_preds_pop$Total_Pop)
      pop_weights = county_preds_pop$Total_Pop / total_pop
      
      ADRF$mu_hat[j] = mean(county_preds_pop$mean)
      ADRF$rate_hat[j] = sum(county_preds_pop$mean)/total_pop*100000 
    }
    
    county_ADRF_list[[i]] = ADRF
  }
  
  return(county_ADRF_list)
}

plot_ADRFs = function(overall_ADRF, county_ADRFs, response,
                      hi.res = FALSE,input_title = "Estimated ADRFs",
                      prefix = "cum2-",filename = "county-adrfs.png") {
  
  county_data_combined <- bind_rows(county_ADRFs, .id = "county_id")
  
  if (hi.res) {
    county_data_combined <- county_data_combined %>% filter(Z <= 26)
    overall_ADRF <- overall_ADRF %>% filter(Z <= 26)
  }
  
  # Main ADRF plot
  p_main <- ggplot() + 
    geom_line(data = county_data_combined, 
              aes(x = Z, 
                  y = .data[[response]], 
                  group = county_id),
              color = "gray70", 
              alpha = 0.3, 
              size = 0.5) +
    geom_line(data = overall_ADRF, 
              aes(x = Z, y = .data[[response]]),
              color = "red", 
              size = 1.2) +
    labs(x = exposure_label, 
         y = response, 
         title = input_title) +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )
  
  # Marginal histogram/density - filtered to x-axis range
  p_top <- ggplot(inla_df %>% filter(cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 >= 0, 
                                     cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= max(overall_ADRF$Z)), 
                  aes(x = cum_monthly_total_pm25_2)) +
    geom_density(fill = "gray80", alpha = 1.5) +  
    theme_void() +
    theme(
      plot.margin = margin(0, 5, 0, 5) # reduce gap
    )
  
  # Combine: p_top above p_main
  combined <- p_top / p_main + plot_layout(heights = c(1, 3))
  
#   ggsave(
#   filename = paste0(prefix,filename),
#   plot = combined,
#   path = "~/work/important-plots",
#   width = 8,
#   height = 10,
#   dpi = 600
# )
  
  return(combined)
}
```

```{r}
county_ADRFs = county_DRF_to_ADRF(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df)
plot_ADRFs(full_data_ADRF,county_ADRFs,response = "rate_hat",hi.res = FALSE)
plot_ADRFs(full_data_ADRF,county_ADRFs,response = "rate_hat",hi.res = TRUE,prefix = "cum2-hi.res-")
```

## Same analysis by SDI quintile group

```{r}
SDIgroup_DRF_to_ADRF_CI = function(DRF_list, dataset, group_labels, num_clus) {

  # time-specific populations
  county_pops = dataset %>%
    select(NAME, date, Total_Pop)

  cluster_ADRF_list = vector("list", length = num_clus)
  names(cluster_ADRF_list) = as.character(1:num_clus)

  for (cluster_id in 1:num_clus) {

    ADRF = data.frame(
      Z = dose_grid,
      mu_hat = NA, mu_hat_lower = NA, mu_hat_upper = NA,
      rate_hat = NA, rate_hat_lower = NA, rate_hat_upper = NA
    )

    cluster_counties = group_labels$counties[group_labels$Group == cluster_id]

    for (j in 1:length(DRF_list)) {

      dose_results = DRF_list[[j]] %>%
        filter(county %in% cluster_counties)

      if (nrow(dose_results) == 0) next

      dose_results_pop = dose_results %>%
        left_join(county_pops, by = c("county" = "NAME", "date" = "date"))

      # summarize within cluster across counties+time for each bootstrap/posterior sample
      dose_summary = dose_results_pop %>%
        group_by(sample_id) %>%
        summarize(
          sample_mu_hat   = mean(mean, na.rm = TRUE),
          sample_rate_hat = sum(mean, na.rm = TRUE) / sum(Total_Pop, na.rm = TRUE) * 100000,
          .groups = "drop"
        )

      # posterior mean + 95% CI across sample_id
      ADRF$mu_hat[j]       = mean(dose_summary$sample_mu_hat, na.rm = TRUE)
      ADRF$mu_hat_lower[j] = quantile(dose_summary$sample_mu_hat, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)
      ADRF$mu_hat_upper[j] = quantile(dose_summary$sample_mu_hat, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)

      ADRF$rate_hat[j]       = mean(dose_summary$sample_rate_hat, na.rm = TRUE)
      ADRF$rate_hat_lower[j] = quantile(dose_summary$sample_rate_hat, 0.025, na.rm = TRUE)
      ADRF$rate_hat_upper[j] = quantile(dose_summary$sample_rate_hat, 0.975, na.rm = TRUE)
    }

    cluster_ADRF_list[[as.character(cluster_id)]] = ADRF
  }

  return(cluster_ADRF_list)
}

plot_cluster_ADRFs_facet_CI = function(overall_ADRF,
                                      cluster_ADRFs,
                                      response = "rate_hat",
                                      hi.res = FALSE,
                                      input_title = "Estimated SDI Quintile Specific ADRFs",
                                      prefix = "cum2-",
                                      filename = "cluster-adrfs-facet-ci.png",
                                      overlay_overall = FALSE) {

  # bind cluster list + make factor for facet labels
  cluster_df = bind_rows(cluster_ADRFs, .id = "Group") %>%
    mutate(Group = factor(Group))

  overall_df = overall_ADRF

  if (hi.res) {
    cluster_df = cluster_df %>% filter(Z <= 26)
    overall_df = overall_df %>% filter(Z <= 26)
  }

  # map response -> CI columns
  resp_lower = paste0(response, "_lower")
  resp_upper = paste0(response, "_upper")

  # basic plotting dataframe checks (quietly)
  stopifnot(response %in% names(cluster_df))
  stopifnot(resp_lower %in% names(cluster_df))
  stopifnot(resp_upper %in% names(cluster_df))

  # Color palette (used for facet strip / optional aesthetics)
  cluster_colors <- c(
    "1" = "#F57B63",
    "2" = "#A6A431",
    "3" = "#00996F",
    "4" = "#2BA5B1",
    "5" = "#C67ACD"
  )

  p <- ggplot(cluster_df, aes(x = Z)) +
    # cluster CI ribbon + mean line
    geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = .data[[resp_lower]],
                    ymax = .data[[resp_upper]],
                    fill = Group, color = Group),
                alpha = 0.20,
                color = NA) +
    geom_line(aes(y = .data[[response]], fill = Group, color = Group),
              linewidth = 0.9) +
    facet_wrap2(~ Group, scales = "free_y",axes = "all") +
    scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors, drop = FALSE) +
    scale_fill_manual(values = cluster_colors, drop = FALSE) +
    labs(
      x = exposure_label,y = y_label,
      title = input_title,fill = "SDI Quintile",color = "SDI Quintile") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
      plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
      axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
      axis.text = element_text(size = 12),
      strip.text = element_text(size = 10)
    )

  # Optional: overlay overall ADRF + CI in each facet
  if (overlay_overall) {
    # only add if overall has the needed columns
    if (all(c(response, resp_lower, resp_upper) %in% names(overall_df))) {
      p <- p +
        geom_ribbon(
          data = overall_df,
          aes(x = Z, ymin = .data[[resp_lower]], ymax = .data[[resp_upper]]),
          inherit.aes = FALSE,
          alpha = 0.12
        ) +
        geom_line(
          data = overall_df,
          aes(x = Z, y = .data[[response]]),
          inherit.aes = FALSE,
          linewidth = 1.0
        )
    } else {
      message("overlay_overall=TRUE but overall_ADRF is missing CI columns for response; overlaying mean only.")
      p <- p +
        geom_line(
          data = overall_df,
          aes(x = Z, y = .data[[response]]),
          inherit.aes = FALSE,
          linewidth = 1.0
        )
    }
  }

  # ggsave(
  #   filename = paste0(prefix, filename),
  #   plot = p,
  #   path = "~/work/important-plots",
  #   width = 8,
  #   height = 6,
  #   dpi = 600
  # )

  return(p)
}

cluster_ADRFs_ci = SDIgroup_DRF_to_ADRF_CI(bootstrapped_DRFs, inla_df, group_labels, num_clus)

# rate plot (full range)
plot_cluster_ADRFs_facet_CI(full_data_ADRF, cluster_ADRFs_ci, response = "rate_hat",
                            hi.res = FALSE, input_title = "SDI Quintile Specific ADRFs", overlay_overall = FALSE)

# hi-res plot
plot_cluster_ADRFs_facet_CI(full_data_ADRF, cluster_ADRFs_ci, response = "rate_hat",
                            hi.res = TRUE, input_title = "SDI Quintile Specific ADRFs",
                            prefix = "cum2-hi.res-", overlay_overall = FALSE)
```

# AGTE: evaluate ADRF at two levels of treatment for which we want to compare and take the difference

## Function to calculate

```{r}
estimate_AGTE = function(z1,z0,ADRF_curve){
  # AGTE1 = (ADRF_curve$mu_hat[ADRF_curve$Z == z1]) - (ADRF_curve$mu_hat[ADRF_curve$Z == z0])
  # AGTE2 = (ADRF_curve$rate_hat[ADRF_curve$Z == z1]) - (ADRF_curve$rate_hat[ADRF_curve$Z == z0])
  AGTE3 = (ADRF_curve$rate_hat[ADRF_curve$Z == z1]) / (ADRF_curve$rate_hat[ADRF_curve$Z == z0])

  return(AGTE3)
}


#MAX VS MIN CONTRAST
tau_hat = estimate_AGTE(332.541,0,full_data_ADRF)

#2 SD CONTRAST
mean(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2[inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2]) 

sd(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2[inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2]) 

tau_hat
```

## Function to calculate with uncertainty quantification

```{r}
estimate_AGTE_with_ci = function(DRF_list, dataset, z1, z0, type = "ratio") {
  # type: "difference" for Y(z1) - Y(z0), "ratio" for Y(z1) / Y(z0)
  
  # Find indices for the specified treatment levels
  z1_idx = which(dose_grid == z1)
  z0_idx = which(dose_grid == z0)
  
  if (length(z1_idx) == 0 | length(z0_idx) == 0) {
    stop("Specified treatment levels not found in dose_grid")
  }
  
  # Get the DRF results for both treatment levels
  z1_results = DRF_list[[z1_idx]]
  z0_results = DRF_list[[z0_idx]]
  
  county_pops = dataset %>% select(NAME, date, Total_Pop)
  
  # Join population data
  z1_results_pop = z1_results %>% 
    left_join(county_pops, by = c("county" = "NAME", "date" = "date"))

  z0_results_pop = z0_results %>% 
    left_join(county_pops, by = c("county" = "NAME", "date" = "date"))
  
  # Calculate estimates for each bootstrap sample
  z1_summary = z1_results_pop %>% 
    group_by(sample_id) %>% 
    summarize(
      # Unweighted estimates
      sample_mu_hat = mean(mean),
      sample_rate_hat = sum(mean)/sum(Total_Pop)*100000,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  z0_summary = z0_results_pop %>% 
    group_by(sample_id) %>% 
    summarize(
      # Unweighted estimates
      sample_mu_hat = mean(mean),
      sample_rate_hat = sum(mean)/sum(Total_Pop)*100000,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # Merge by sample_id to ensure proper pairing
  agte_data = z1_summary %>% 
    inner_join(z0_summary, by = "sample_id", suffix = c("_z1", "_z0"))
  
  # Calculate AGTE for each bootstrap sample
  if (type == "difference") {
    agte_data = agte_data %>% 
      mutate(
        # Unweighted AGTE
        agte_mu = sample_mu_hat_z1 - sample_mu_hat_z0,
        agte_rate = sample_rate_hat_z1 - sample_rate_hat_z0
      )
  } else if (type == "ratio") {
    agte_data = agte_data %>% 
      mutate(
        # Unweighted AGTE
        agte_mu = sample_mu_hat_z1 / sample_mu_hat_z0,
        agte_rate = sample_rate_hat_z1 / sample_rate_hat_z0
      )
  } else {
    stop("type must be either 'difference' or 'ratio'")
  }
  
  # Calculate point estimates and confidence intervals
  agte_results = data.frame(
    z1 = z1,
    z0 = z0,
    type = type,
    
    # Unweighted estimates
    agte_mu_hat = mean(agte_data$agte_mu),
    agte_mu_lower = quantile(agte_data$agte_mu, 0.025),
    agte_mu_upper = quantile(agte_data$agte_mu, 0.975),
    
    agte_rate_hat = mean(agte_data$agte_rate),
    agte_rate_lower = quantile(agte_data$agte_rate, 0.025),
    agte_rate_upper = quantile(agte_data$agte_rate, 0.975)
  )
  rownames(agte_results) = NULL
  
  return(agte_results)
}

estimate_AGTE_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,152.893,0,"ratio")
estimate_AGTE_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,152.893,0,"ratio")[7:9]

estimate_AGTE_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,5.022,0,"ratio")
estimate_AGTE_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,5.022,0,"ratio")[7:9]

tau_hat = as.numeric(estimate_AGTE_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,
                                           5.022,0,"ratio")[7])
```

### Calculate AGTE by SDI quintile group

```{r}
estimate_AGTE_bygroup_with_ci = function(DRF_list, dataset, z1, z0, type = "ratio") {
  # type: "difference" for Y(z1) - Y(z0), "ratio" for Y(z1) / Y(z0)
  
  # Find indices for the specified treatment levels
  z1_idx = which(dose_grid == z1)
  z0_idx = which(dose_grid == z0)
  
  if (length(z1_idx) == 0 | length(z0_idx) == 0) {
    stop("Specified treatment levels not found in dose_grid")
  }
  
  # Get the DRF results for both treatment levels
  z1_results = DRF_list[[z1_idx]]
  z0_results = DRF_list[[z0_idx]]
  
  county_pops = dataset %>% select(NAME, Group, date, Total_Pop)
  
  # Join population data
  z1_results_pop = z1_results %>% 
    left_join(county_pops, by = c("county" = "NAME", "date" = "date"))
  z0_results_pop = z0_results %>% 
    left_join(county_pops, by = c("county" = "NAME", "date" = "date"))
  
  # Calculate estimates for each bootstrap sample and group
  z1_summary = z1_results_pop %>% 
    group_by(sample_id, Group) %>% 
    summarize(
      sample_mu_hat = mean(mean),
      sample_rate_hat = sum(mean)/sum(Total_Pop)*100000,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  z0_summary = z0_results_pop %>% 
    group_by(sample_id, Group) %>% 
    summarize(
      sample_mu_hat = mean(mean),
      sample_rate_hat = sum(mean)/sum(Total_Pop)*100000,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # Merge by sample_id AND Group to ensure proper pairing
  agte_data = z1_summary %>% 
    inner_join(z0_summary, by = c("sample_id", "Group"), suffix = c("_z1", "_z0"))
  
  predicted_potential_outcomes = agte_data %>% group_by(Group) %>% 
    summarize(mu_hat_z0 = mean(sample_mu_hat_z0), mu_hat_z1 = mean(sample_mu_hat_z1),
              rate_hat_z0 = mean(sample_rate_hat_z0), rate_hat_z1 = mean(sample_rate_hat_z1))
  
  # Calculate AGTE for each bootstrap sample and group
  if (type == "difference") {
    agte_data = agte_data %>% 
      mutate(
        agte_mu = sample_mu_hat_z1 - sample_mu_hat_z0,
        agte_rate = sample_rate_hat_z1 - sample_rate_hat_z0
      )
  } else if (type == "ratio") {
    agte_data = agte_data %>% 
      mutate(
        agte_mu = sample_mu_hat_z1 / sample_mu_hat_z0,
        agte_rate = sample_rate_hat_z1 / sample_rate_hat_z0
      )
  } else {
    stop("type must be either 'difference' or 'ratio'")
  }
  
  # Calculate point estimates and confidence intervals BY GROUP
  agte_results = agte_data %>%
    group_by(Group) %>%
    summarize(
      z1 = z1,
      z0 = z0,
      type = type,
      
      agte_mu_hat = mean(agte_mu),
      agte_mu_lower = quantile(agte_mu, 0.025),
      agte_mu_upper = quantile(agte_mu, 0.975),
      
      agte_rate_hat = mean(agte_rate),
      agte_rate_lower = quantile(agte_rate, 0.025),
      agte_rate_upper = quantile(agte_rate, 0.975),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  results = list(predicted_potential_outcomes,agte_results)
  return(results)
}

test = estimate_AGTE_bygroup_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,5.022,0,"ratio")
test[[1]]
test[[2]]
```

### Calculate AGTE by county

```{r}
estimate_AGTE_bycounty_with_ci = function(DRF_list, dataset, z1, z0, type = "ratio") {
  # type: "difference" for Y(z1) - Y(z0), "ratio" for Y(z1) / Y(z0)
  
  # Find indices for the specified treatment levels
  z1_idx = which(dose_grid == z1)
  z0_idx = which(dose_grid == z0)
  
  if (length(z1_idx) == 0 | length(z0_idx) == 0) {
    stop("Specified treatment levels not found in dose_grid")
  }
  
  # Get the DRF results for both treatment levels
  z1_results = DRF_list[[z1_idx]]
  z0_results = DRF_list[[z0_idx]]
  
  county_pops = dataset %>% select(NAME, Group, date, Total_Pop)
  
  # Join population data
  z1_results_pop = z1_results %>% 
    left_join(county_pops, by = c("county" = "NAME", "date" = "date"))
  z0_results_pop = z0_results %>% 
    left_join(county_pops, by = c("county" = "NAME", "date" = "date"))
  
  # Calculate estimates for each bootstrap sample and group
  z1_summary = z1_results_pop %>% 
    group_by(sample_id, county) %>% 
    summarize(
      sample_mu_hat = mean(mean),
      sample_rate_hat = sum(mean)/sum(Total_Pop)*100000,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  z0_summary = z0_results_pop %>% 
    group_by(sample_id, county) %>% 
    summarize(
      sample_mu_hat = mean(mean),
      sample_rate_hat = sum(mean)/sum(Total_Pop)*100000,
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  # Merge by sample_id AND Group to ensure proper pairing
  agte_data = z1_summary %>% 
    inner_join(z0_summary, by = c("sample_id", "county"), suffix = c("_z1", "_z0"))
  
  predicted_potential_outcomes = agte_data %>% group_by(county) %>% 
    summarize(mu_hat_z0 = mean(sample_mu_hat_z0), mu_hat_z1 = mean(sample_mu_hat_z1),
              rate_hat_z0 = mean(sample_rate_hat_z0), rate_hat_z1 = mean(sample_rate_hat_z1))
  
  # Calculate AGTE for each bootstrap sample and group
  if (type == "difference") {
    agte_data = agte_data %>% 
      mutate(
        agte_mu = sample_mu_hat_z1 - sample_mu_hat_z0,
        agte_rate = sample_rate_hat_z1 - sample_rate_hat_z0
      )
  } else if (type == "ratio") {
    agte_data = agte_data %>% 
      mutate(
        agte_mu = sample_mu_hat_z1 / sample_mu_hat_z0,
        agte_rate = sample_rate_hat_z1 / sample_rate_hat_z0
      )
  } else {
    stop("type must be either 'difference' or 'ratio'")
  }
  
  # Calculate point estimates and confidence intervals BY GROUP
  agte_results = agte_data %>%
    group_by(county) %>%
    summarize(
      z1 = z1,
      z0 = z0,
      type = type,
      
      agte_mu_hat = mean(agte_mu),
      agte_mu_lower = quantile(agte_mu, 0.025),
      agte_mu_upper = quantile(agte_mu, 0.975),
      
      agte_rate_hat = mean(agte_rate),
      agte_rate_lower = quantile(agte_rate, 0.025),
      agte_rate_upper = quantile(agte_rate, 0.975),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
  
  results = list(predicted_potential_outcomes,agte_results)
  return(results)
}
```

### Visualize relative risk ratios 

```{r}
# y_label = expression(paste("Risk ratio, ", tau[rr], "(", bar(z)[t], ")"))
y_label = expression(paste("Risk ratio, ", tau[rr], "(", z[t], ")"))


visualize_causal_effect_with_ci = function(ADRF_curve, z0 = 0, contrast = "ratio",
                                           top_plot = c("hist", "density"),
                                           bins = 40,
                                           top_height = 1, main_height = 3,
                                           save_path = "/home/jovyan/work/important-plots/",
                                           save_name = "cum2-overall-rrcurve-withci.png",
                                           save_width = 8, save_height = 6, save_dpi = 600){

  top_plot <- match.arg(top_plot)

  # helper: make the marginal top plot restricted to ADRF x-range
  make_top_plot <- function(xmax){
    df_top <- inla_df %>%
      dplyr::filter(cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 >= 0,
                    cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= xmax)

    p_top <- ggplot(df_top, aes(x = cum_monthly_total_pm25_2))

    if(top_plot == "hist"){
      p_top <- p_top +
        geom_histogram(bins = bins, fill = "gray80", color = "gray60")
    } else {
      p_top <- p_top +
        geom_density(fill = "gray80", alpha = 1.0)
    }

    p_top <- p_top + labs(y = "Count") +
      theme_void() +
      theme(
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15,angle = 90,vjust = 0.5,margin = margin(r=-70)),
        plot.margin = margin(0, 5, 0, 5))
  }

  #Difference
  if(contrast == "difference"){

    causal_diff = data.frame(
      Z = ADRF_curve$Z,
      diff = NA_real_,
      diff_lower = NA_real_,
      diff_upper = NA_real_
    )

    ref_idx = which(ADRF_curve$Z == z0)

    for (i in 1:nrow(ADRF_curve)){
      result = estimate_AGTE_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs, inla_df,
                                     dose_grid[i], dose_grid[ref_idx], "difference")

      causal_diff$diff[i]       = result$agte_mu_hat
      causal_diff$diff_lower[i] = result$agte_mu_lower
      causal_diff$diff_upper[i] = result$agte_mu_upper
    }

    p_main <- ggplot(causal_diff, aes(x = Z, y = diff)) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = diff_lower, ymax = diff_upper),
                  fill = "red", alpha = 0.2) +
      geom_line(color = "red", size = 1.2) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
      labs(x = exposure_label,
           y = "Difference",
           title = paste0("Causal Difference Compared to Z = ", z0)) +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_width(0.03)) +
      theme_classic() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 12))

    # top + main
    xmax <- max(causal_diff$Z, na.rm = TRUE)
    p_top <- make_top_plot(xmax)

    combined <- p_top / p_main + patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(top_height, main_height))

    print(combined)

    # if you want to save diff too, uncomment:
    # ggsave(filename = sub("\\.png$", "-diff.png", save_name),
    #        plot = combined, path = save_path,
    #        width = save_width, height = save_height, dpi = save_dpi)

  } else {

    #Risk ratio
    risk_ratio = data.frame(
      Z = ADRF_curve$Z,
      RR = NA_real_,
      RR_lower = NA_real_,
      RR_upper = NA_real_
    )

    ref_idx = which(ADRF_curve$Z == z0)

    for (i in 1:nrow(ADRF_curve)){
      result = estimate_AGTE_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs, inla_df,
                                     dose_grid[i], dose_grid[ref_idx], "ratio")

      risk_ratio$RR[i]       = result$agte_rate_hat
      risk_ratio$RR_lower[i] = result$agte_rate_lower
      risk_ratio$RR_upper[i] = result$agte_rate_upper
    }

    p_main <- ggplot(risk_ratio, aes(x = Z, y = RR)) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = RR_lower, ymax = RR_upper),
                  fill = "red", alpha = 0.2) +
      geom_line(color = "red", size = 1.2) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
      labs(x = exposure_label,y = y_label) +
      coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0,155)) + 
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_width(0.03)) +
      theme_classic() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 12))

    xmax <- max(risk_ratio$Z, na.rm = TRUE)
    p_top <- make_top_plot(xmax)

    combined <- p_top / p_main + patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(top_height, main_height))

    print(combined)

    # ggsave(
    #   filename = save_name,
    #   plot = combined,
    #   path = save_path,
    #   width = save_width,
    #   height = save_height,
    #   dpi = save_dpi
    # )
  }
}

visualize_causal_effect_with_ci(full_data_ADRF)
```

### Visualize relative risk ratios by SDI quintile group: 

```{r}
visualize_causal_effect_bygroup_with_ci = function(z0 = 0, contrast = "ratio",
                                                   top_plot = c("hist", "density"),
                                                   bins = 40,
                                                   top_height = 1, main_height = 3,
                                                   save_path = "/home/jovyan/work/important-plots/",
                                                   save_name = "cum2-group-rrcurves-withci.png",
                                                   save_width = 8, save_height = 6, save_dpi = 600){

  top_plot <- match.arg(top_plot)

  # One marginal histogram/density for the whole figure (x-range aligned to dose_grid)
  make_top_plot <- function(xmax){
    df_top <- inla_df %>%
      dplyr::filter(cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 >= 0,
                    cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= xmax)

    p_top <- ggplot(df_top, aes(x = cum_monthly_total_pm25_2))

    if(top_plot == "hist"){
      p_top <- p_top +
        geom_histogram(bins = bins, fill = "gray80", color = "gray60")
    } else {
      p_top <- p_top +
        geom_density(fill = "gray80", alpha = 1.0)
    }

    p_top <- p_top + labs(y = "Count") +
      theme_void() +
      theme(
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 15,angle = 90,vjust = 0.5,margin = margin(r=-70)),
        plot.margin = margin(0, 5, 0, 5))
  }

  xmax <- max(dose_grid, na.rm = TRUE)
  p_top <- make_top_plot(xmax)

  if(contrast == "difference"){
    causal_diff_all = data.frame()

    ref_idx = which(dose_grid == z0)

    for (i in 1:length(dose_grid)){
      result = estimate_AGTE_bygroup_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs, inla_df,
                                            dose_grid[i], dose_grid[ref_idx], "difference")
      result$Z = dose_grid[i]
      causal_diff_all = dplyr::bind_rows(causal_diff_all, result)
    }

    p_main <- ggplot(causal_diff_all, aes(x = Z, y = agte_mu_hat,
                                         color = Group, fill = Group)) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = agte_mu_lower, ymax = agte_mu_upper),
                  alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
      geom_line(size = 1.2) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
      labs(x = exposure_label,
           y = "Difference",
           title = paste0("Causal Difference by Group (Compared to Z = ", z0, ")")) +
      facet_wrap2(~Group, axes = "all") +
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_width(0.03)) +
      theme_classic() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 11),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "right"
      )

    combined <- p_top / p_main + patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(top_height, main_height))

    print(combined)
    return(causal_diff_all)

  } else {

    risk_ratio_all = data.frame()

    ref_idx = which(dose_grid == z0)

    for (i in 1:length(dose_grid)){
      result = estimate_AGTE_bygroup_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs, inla_df,
                                            dose_grid[i], dose_grid[ref_idx], "ratio")

      result[[2]]$Z = dose_grid[i]
      risk_ratio_all = dplyr::bind_rows(risk_ratio_all, result[[2]])
    }

    p_main <- ggplot(risk_ratio_all, aes(x = Z, y = agte_rate_hat,
                                        color = Group, fill = Group)) +
      geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = agte_rate_lower, ymax = agte_rate_upper),
                  alpha = 0.2, color = NA) +
      geom_line(size = 1.2) +
      geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +
      labs(x = exposure_label,y = y_label,color = "SDI Quintile",fill = "SDI Quintile") +
      facet_wrap2(~Group, axes = "all") +
      coord_cartesian(xlim = c(0,155)) + 
      scale_y_continuous(breaks = breaks_width(0.05)) +
      theme_classic() +
      theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 12),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 15),
        axis.text  = element_text(size = 12),
        legend.position = "right"
      )

    #combined <- p_top / p_main + patchwork::plot_layout(heights = c(top_height, main_height))

    print(p_main)

    # ggsave(
    #   filename = save_name,
    #   plot = p_main,
    #   path = save_path,
    #   width = save_width,
    #   height = save_height,
    #   dpi = save_dpi
    # )
  }
}

visualize_causal_effect_bygroup_with_ci(z0 = 0, contrast = "ratio", top_plot = "hist")
```

```{r}
interpret_AGTE_by_county = function(AGTE_estimate,dataset){
  
  AGTE_by_county = data.frame(county = counties,avg_pop = NA,avg_death_rate = NA,new_death_rate = NA,
                              avg_deaths = NA,new_deaths = NA)
  
  for(i in 1:length(counties)){
    county_data = dataset %>% filter(NAME == counties[i]) %>% dplyr::select(Total_Pop,death_rate)
    AGTE_by_county$avg_pop[i] = mean(county_data$Total_Pop)
    
    AGTE_by_county$avg_death_rate[i] = mean(county_data$death_rate)
    AGTE_by_county$new_death_rate[i] = mean(county_data$death_rate) * AGTE_estimate
    
    AGTE_by_county$avg_deaths[i] = mean(county_data$death_rate)*mean(county_data$Total_Pop)/100000
    AGTE_by_county$new_deaths[i] = (mean(county_data$death_rate) * AGTE_estimate)*mean(county_data$Total_Pop)/100000
  }
  
  return(AGTE_by_county)
}

AGTE_by_county = interpret_AGTE_by_county(AGTE_estimate = tau_hat, dataset = inla_df)
```

```{r}
for (i in 1:length(county_ADRFs)){

}

county_pct_change %>% ggplot(aes(x=county, y=delta)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + labs(title = "Relative Risk in Death Rate by County",
       x = "County",
       y = "Relative Risk in Death Rate") +
```

### Visualize relative risk for each SDI quintile group with barplot

```{r}
cluster_pct_change = data.frame(Group = c("1","2","3","4","5"), delta = NA)

for (i in 1:length(cluster_ADRFs)){
  cluster_pct_change$delta[i] = estimate_AGTE(5.022,0,cluster_ADRFs[[i]])
}

cluster_pct_change %>% ggplot(aes(x=Group, y=delta, fill=Group)) + 
  geom_bar(stat = "identity") + scale_color_viridis(discrete=TRUE) +
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0,1.2,0.2),limits = c(0,1.2)) + 
  labs(title = "Relative Risk in Death Rate by Cluster",
       x = "Cluster",
       y = "Relative Risk in Death Rate") +
  theme_classic() +
  theme(
    plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
    axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
    axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
    axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 90, hjust = 1),
    legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
    legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
    legend.position = "top"
  )
```

### Visualize relative risk for each SDI quintile group with lineplot

```{r}
test = estimate_AGTE_bygroup_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs, inla_df,
                                     5.022, 0, "ratio")

cluster_colors <- c(
  "1" = "#F57B63",  # coral/orange (Cluster 1)
  "2" = "#A6A431",  # olive green   (Cluster 2)
  "3" = "#00996F",  # greenish teal (Cluster 3)
  "4" = "#2BA5B1",  # teal/blue (Cluster 4)
  "5" = "#C67ACD"   # magenta/purple (Cluster 5)
)

test[[2]] %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = agte_rate_hat, y = Group,  # Swapped x and y
               xmin = agte_rate_lower, xmax = agte_rate_upper,  # Changed to xmin/xmax
               color = Group)) +
    geom_pointrange(
        position = position_dodge(width = 0.5),
        size = 0.9,
        linewidth = 1.2
    ) +
    scale_color_manual(values = cluster_colors) +
    geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "gray50") +  # Changed to vline
    labs(title = "Risk Ratio by Group (Z = 11 vs Z = 0)",
         y = "Group",  # Swapped labels
         x = "Risk Ratio") +
    theme_classic() +
    theme(
        plot.title = element_text(hjust = 0.5, size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title = element_text(size = 12),
        axis.text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.title = element_text(size = 11),
        legend.text = element_text(size = 10),
        legend.position = "top"
    )
```

### SDI Group specific effects

```{r}
predicted_total_deaths_bygroup_year_ci <- function(
  DRF_list,
  dataset,
  z,
  year = 2019,
  probs = c(0.025, 0.975),
  drop_missing_groups = TRUE,
  annualize = TRUE
) {
  # Find dose index
  z_idx <- which(dose_grid == z)
  if (length(z_idx) == 0) stop("Specified z not found in dose_grid")
  if (length(z_idx) > 1) stop("Specified z matches multiple entries in dose_grid")

  z_results <- DRF_list[[z_idx]]

  # Key columns needed in dataset for joining and filtering
  key_df <- dataset %>%
    dplyr::select(NAME, Group, date, Year, Total_Pop) %>%
    dplyr::distinct()

  # Join predictions to dataset keys, filter to the requested year
  z_joined <- z_results %>%
    dplyr::left_join(key_df, by = c("county" = "NAME", "date" = "date")) %>%
    dplyr::filter(Year == year)

  if (drop_missing_groups) {
    z_joined <- z_joined %>% dplyr::filter(!is.na(Group))
  }

  rate_mult <- if (annualize) 12 else 1

  # Totals + rates per bootstrap sample and group
  totals_by_sample <- z_joined %>%
    dplyr::group_by(sample_id, Group) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      total_deaths_hat = sum(mean, na.rm = TRUE),
      person_months = sum(Total_Pop, na.rm = TRUE),
      rate_hat = (total_deaths_hat / person_months) * 100000 * rate_mult,
      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # Bootstrap point estimate and CI by group
  totals_ci <- totals_by_sample %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      z = z,
      year = year,

      total_deaths_pred = mean(total_deaths_hat, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_deaths_lower = stats::quantile(total_deaths_hat, probs[1], na.rm = TRUE),
      total_deaths_upper = stats::quantile(total_deaths_hat, probs[2], na.rm = TRUE),

      rate_pred = mean(rate_hat, na.rm = TRUE),
      rate_lower = stats::quantile(rate_hat, probs[1], na.rm = TRUE),
      rate_upper = stats::quantile(rate_hat, probs[2], na.rm = TRUE),

      .groups = "drop"
    )

  list(
    totals_by_sample = totals_by_sample,
    totals_ci = totals_ci
  )
}

predicted_total_deaths_two_doses_bygroup_year_ci <- function(
  DRF_list,
  dataset,
  z0,
  z1,
  year = 2019,
  probs = c(0.025, 0.975),
  annualize = TRUE
) {
  res0 <- predicted_total_deaths_bygroup_year_ci(
    DRF_list = DRF_list, dataset = dataset, z = z0, year = year, probs = probs, annualize = annualize
  )
  res1 <- predicted_total_deaths_bygroup_year_ci(
    DRF_list = DRF_list, dataset = dataset, z = z1, year = year, probs = probs, annualize = annualize
  )

  # Wide summary (means and CIs separately)
  totals_wide <- res0$totals_ci %>%
    dplyr::select(
      Group, year,
      total0_hat   = total_deaths_pred,
      total0_lower = total_deaths_lower,
      total0_upper = total_deaths_upper,
      rate0_hat    = rate_pred,
      rate0_lower  = rate_lower,
      rate0_upper  = rate_upper
    ) %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(
      res1$totals_ci %>%
        dplyr::select(
          Group, year,
          total1_hat   = total_deaths_pred,
          total1_lower = total_deaths_lower,
          total1_upper = total_deaths_upper,
          rate1_hat    = rate_pred,
          rate1_lower  = rate_lower,
          rate1_upper  = rate_upper
        ),
      by = c("Group", "year")
    )

  # Pair bootstrap samples to compute diff and RR distributions
  paired <- res1$totals_by_sample %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(
      res0$totals_by_sample,
      by = c("sample_id", "Group"),
      suffix = c("_z1", "_z0")
    ) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      # totals: difference + ratio
      total_diff = total_deaths_hat_z1 - total_deaths_hat_z0,
      total_ratio = total_deaths_hat_z1 / total_deaths_hat_z0,

      # rates: difference + risk ratio
      rate_diff = rate_hat_z1 - rate_hat_z0,
      rate_rr = rate_hat_z1 / rate_hat_z0
    )

  contrasts_ci <- paired %>%
    dplyr::group_by(Group) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      year = year,
      z0 = z0,
      z1 = z1,

      total_diff_hat   = mean(total_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
      total_diff_lower = stats::quantile(total_diff, probs[1], na.rm = TRUE),
      total_diff_upper = stats::quantile(total_diff, probs[2], na.rm = TRUE),

      # total_ratio_hat   = mean(total_ratio, na.rm = TRUE),
      # total_ratio_lower = stats::quantile(total_ratio, probs[1], na.rm = TRUE),
      # total_ratio_upper = stats::quantile(total_ratio, probs[2], na.rm = TRUE),
      # 
      # rate_diff_hat   = mean(rate_diff, na.rm = TRUE),
      # rate_diff_lower = stats::quantile(rate_diff, probs[1], na.rm = TRUE),
      # rate_diff_upper = stats::quantile(rate_diff, probs[2], na.rm = TRUE),

      rate_rr_hat   = mean(rate_rr, na.rm = TRUE),
      rate_rr_lower = stats::quantile(rate_rr, probs[1], na.rm = TRUE),
      rate_rr_upper = stats::quantile(rate_rr, probs[2], na.rm = TRUE),

      .groups = "drop"
    )

  # Combine and create formatted CI strings
  totals_wide2 <- totals_wide %>%
    dplyr::left_join(contrasts_ci, by = c("Group", "year")) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      total0_ci = paste0(round(total0_hat, 1), " (", round(total0_lower, 1), ", ", round(total0_upper, 1), ")"),
      total1_ci = paste0(round(total1_hat, 1), " (", round(total1_lower, 1), ", ", round(total1_upper, 1), ")"),

      rate0_ci  = paste0(round(rate0_hat, 2),  " (", round(rate0_lower, 2),  ", ", round(rate0_upper, 2),  ")"),
      rate1_ci  = paste0(round(rate1_hat, 2),  " (", round(rate1_lower, 2),  ", ", round(rate1_upper, 2),  ")"),

      total_diff_ci  = paste0(round(total_diff_hat, 1), " (", round(total_diff_lower, 1), ", ", round(total_diff_upper, 1), ")"),
      # total_ratio_ci = paste0(round(total_ratio_hat, 2), " (", round(total_ratio_lower, 2), ", ", round(total_ratio_upper, 2), ")"),

      # rate_diff_ci = paste0(round(rate_diff_hat, 2), " (", round(rate_diff_lower, 2), ", ", round(rate_diff_upper, 2), ")"),
      rate_rr_ci   = paste0(round(rate_rr_hat, 2),   " (", round(rate_rr_lower, 2),   ", ", round(rate_rr_upper, 2),   ")")
    )

  list(
    z0 = res0,
    z1 = res1,
    paired = paired,                 # contains bootstrap distributions of diffs/RRs
    contrasts_ci = contrasts_ci,     # numeric summaries
    totals_wide = totals_wide2       # formatted strings too
  )
}


totals_2019 <- predicted_total_deaths_two_doses_bygroup_year_ci(
  DRF_list = bootstrapped_DRFs,
  dataset = inla_df,
  z0 = 0,
  z1 = 5.022,
  year = 2019,
  annualize = TRUE
)

totals_2019$totals_wide
```

Monthly level table:

```{r}
# --- 1) cluster summary ---
cluster_summary <- inla_df %>% filter(Year == 2019) %>%
  group_by(Group) %>%  
  summarize(
    total_pop = sum(Total_Pop[month == 6]),
    avg_sdi = mean(SDI),
    avg_deaths = sum(deaths), #change to mean() to match potential outcomes 
    obs_death_rate = sum(deaths)/sum(Total_Pop)*100000,
    .groups = "drop"
  )

# --- 2) ADRF values (test[[1]]) ---
adrf_df <- test[[1]] %>%
  mutate(Group = as.character(Group)) %>%
  select(Group, mu_hat_z0, mu_hat_z1, rate_hat_z0, rate_hat_z1)

# --- 3) AGTE difference values (test[[2]]) ---
agte_diff_df <- test[[2]] %>%
  filter(type == "difference") %>%
  mutate(Group = as.character(Group)) %>%
  select(Group,
         agte_mu_hat, agte_mu_lower, agte_mu_upper)

# --- 4) AGTE ratio values (test2[[2]]) ---
agte_ratio_df <- test2[[2]] %>%
  filter(type == "ratio") %>%
  mutate(Group = as.character(Group)) %>%
  select(Group,
         agte_rate_hat, agte_rate_lower, agte_rate_upper)

# --- 5) join ---
table_df <- cluster_summary %>%
  mutate(Group = as.character(Group)) %>%
  left_join(adrf_df, by = "Group") %>%
  left_join(agte_diff_df, by = "Group") %>%
  left_join(agte_ratio_df, by = "Group")

# --- 6) formatting w/ 3 decimals ---
table_df <- table_df %>%
  mutate(
    total_pop_fmt = comma(round(total_pop)),
    avg_sdi = round(avg_sdi),
    avg_deaths = avg_deaths,
    obs_death_rate = round(obs_death_rate, 2),

    mu0 = round(mu_hat_z0, 1),
    mu1 = round(mu_hat_z1, 1),
    rate0 = round(rate_hat_z0, 2),
    rate1 = round(rate_hat_z1, 2),

    diff_est = round(agte_mu_hat, 1),
    diff_ci = if_else(!is.na(agte_mu_lower),
                      paste0(diff_est, " (",
                             round(agte_mu_lower,1), ", ",
                             round(agte_mu_upper,1), ")"),
                      NA_character_),

    rate_est = round(agte_rate_hat, 2),
    rate_ci = if_else(!is.na(agte_rate_lower),
                      paste0(rate_est, " (",
                             round(agte_rate_lower,2), ", ",
                             round(agte_rate_upper,2), ")"),
                      NA_character_)
  )

# --- 7) final selection ---
out_df <- table_df %>%
  select(Group,
         total_pop_fmt, avg_sdi,
         avg_deaths, mu0, mu1, diff_ci,
         obs_death_rate, rate0, rate1, rate_ci)

diff_label = expression(paste(tau[diff], "(", z[t], ")"))
rr_label = expression(paste(tau[rr], "(", z[t], ")"))

# --- 8) GT table ---
gt_tab1 <- out_df %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "Group") %>%

  cols_label(
    total_pop_fmt    = "Population",
    avg_sdi          = "Avg SDI",
    avg_deaths       = "Observed",
    mu0              = html("E[Y(0)]"),
    mu1              = html("E[Y(11)]"),
    diff_ci          = html("&tau;<sub>diff</sub>(z<sub>t</sub>)"),
    obs_death_rate   = "Observed",
    rate0            = html("E[R(0)]"),
    rate1            = html("E[R(11)]"),
    rate_ci          = html("&tau;<sub>rr</sub>(z<sub>t</sub>)")
  ) %>% 

  tab_spanner(label = "Deaths (2019)",
              columns = c(total_pop_fmt, avg_sdi, avg_deaths, mu0, mu1, diff_ci)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Mortality rate (per 100k per month)",
              columns = c(obs_death_rate, rate0, rate1, rate_ci)) %>%

  # ---- compact table: tighter padding, smaller font ----
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = "8pt",
    column_labels.font.size = "8pt",
    stub.font.size = "8pt",
    table.width = pct(100),

    # The only padding controls allowed
    data_row.padding = px(1),
    column_labels.padding = px(1)
  ) %>%

  # (optional) tighten row group padding too
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(size = px(8)),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%

  cols_align(align = "center", columns = everything()) %>%
  fmt_missing(columns = everything(), missing_text = "-")


gt_tab1

# gtsave(gt_tab1, "sdi-group-causal-table.tex",path = "/home/jovyan/work/important-plots/")
```

Annual level table:

```{r}
library(dplyr)
library(gt)

make_gt_sdi_results_from_totals <- function(
  totals_obj,                 # output of predicted_total_deaths_two_doses_bygroup_year_ci()
  dataset,                    # inla_df (for Observed + Population + Avg SDI)
  year = 2019,
  deaths_col = "deaths",
  pop_col = "Total_Pop",
  sdi_col = "SDI",            # change if your SDI column name differs
  group_col = "Group",
  annualize = TRUE,
  group_labels = c(
    "1" = "0-20%",
    "2" = "20-40%",
    "3" = "40-60%",
    "4" = "60-80%",
    "5" = "80-100%"
  ),
  use_ci_strings = FALSE,     # FALSE -> numeric hats; TRUE -> "(l,u)" strings from totals_obj$totals_wide
  title_label = NULL,
  caption_label = "Causal effect estimates for a significant change in cumulative smoke PM$_{2.5}$ in 2019, summarized by SDI quintile group."
) {

  rate_mult <- if (annualize) 12 else 1

  # Observed deaths + observed rate (matches your annualize logic)
  obs_by_group <- dataset %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$Year == year) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[group_col]])) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      observed_deaths = sum(.data[[deaths_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      person_months   = sum(.data[[pop_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      observed_rate   = (observed_deaths / person_months) * 100000 * rate_mult,
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::rename(Group = !!group_col)

  # Population and Avg SDI (Population as average monthly population in the year)
  demo_by_group <- dataset %>%
    dplyr::filter(.data$Year == year) %>%
    dplyr::filter(!is.na(.data[[group_col]])) %>%
    dplyr::group_by(.data[[group_col]]) %>%
    dplyr::summarize(
      person_months = sum(.data[[pop_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      Population    = person_months / 12,
      Avg_SDI       = mean(.data[[sdi_col]], na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    ) %>%
    dplyr::rename(Group = !!group_col) %>%
    dplyr::select(Group, Population, Avg_SDI)

  tw <- totals_obj$totals_wide

  if (use_ci_strings) {
    model_cols <- tw %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        Group, year,
        EY0 = total0_ci,
        EYZ = total1_ci,
        TD  = total_diff_ci,
        ER0 = rate0_ci,
        ERZ = rate1_ci,
        RR  = rate_rr_ci
      )
  } else {
    model_cols <- tw %>%
      dplyr::transmute(
        Group, year,
        EY0 = total0_hat,
        EYZ = total1_hat,
        TD  = total_diff_hat,
        ER0 = rate0_hat,
        ERZ = rate1_hat,
        RR  = rate_rr_hat
      )
  }

  tab_df <- demo_by_group %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(obs_by_group, by = "Group") %>%
    dplyr::inner_join(model_cols, by = c("Group")) %>%
    dplyr::mutate(
      SDI_Quintile = dplyr::recode(as.character(Group), !!!group_labels),
      .before = 1
    ) %>%
    dplyr::select(
      SDI_Quintile, Population, Avg_SDI,
      observed_deaths, EY0, EYZ, TD,
      observed_rate,  ER0, ERZ, RR
    )

  gt_tbl <- tab_df %>%
    gt() %>%
    cols_label(
      SDI_Quintile   = "SDI Quintile",
      Population     = "Population",
      Avg_SDI        = "Avg SDI",

      observed_deaths = md("Observed"),
      EY0            = md("E[Y(0)]"),
      EYZ            = md("E[Y($z_t$)]"),
      TD             = md("$\\tau_{diff}(z_t)$"),

      observed_rate  = md("Observed"),
      ER0            = md("E[R(0)]"),
      ERZ            = md("E[R($z_t$)]"),
      RR             = md("$\\tau_{rr}(z_t)$")
    ) %>%
    tab_spanner(
      label = md(paste0("Total Deaths (", year, ")")),
      columns = c(observed_deaths, EY0, EYZ, TD)
    ) %>%
    tab_spanner(
      label = md("Mortality rate (per 100k per year)"),
      columns = c(observed_rate, ER0, ERZ, RR)
    ) %>%
    tab_options(
      table.font.size = px(8),
      data_row.padding = px(2)
    ) %>%
    fmt_number(columns = Population, decimals = 0, use_seps = TRUE) %>%
    tab_source_note(source_note = md(caption_label))

  if (!is.null(title_label) && nzchar(title_label)) {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl %>% tab_header(title = md(title_label))
  }

  # Numeric formatting only if we did NOT embed CI strings
  if (!use_ci_strings) {
    gt_tbl <- gt_tbl %>%
      fmt_number(columns = Avg_SDI, decimals = 0) %>%
      fmt_number(columns = c(observed_deaths, EY0, EYZ, TD), decimals = 1) %>%
      fmt_number(columns = c(observed_rate, ER0, ERZ, RR), decimals = 2)
  }

  gt_tbl
}

# ---- create table from your already-working output ----
gt_sdi_2019 <- make_gt_sdi_results_from_totals(
  totals_obj = totals_2019,
  dataset = inla_df,
  year = 2019,
  deaths_col = "deaths",
  pop_col = "Total_Pop",
  sdi_col = "SDI",     # change if needed
  group_col = "Group",
  annualize = TRUE,
  use_ci_strings = FALSE
)

gt_sdi_2019

gtsave(gt_sdi_2019, "annual-sdi-quintile-causal-table.tex",path = "/home/jovyan/work/important-plots/")
```

### Low-Medium-High exposure scenario table:

```{r}
# ---- helper to summarize one exposure band into a single row ----
summarize_exposure_row <- function(idx, obs_df, drfs, z_indices, label){

  # Person-years
  person_yrs <- sum(obs_df$Total_Pop, na.rm = TRUE) / 12

  # Deaths (counts)
  obs_deaths <- sum(obs_df$deaths, na.rm = TRUE)

  pred_counts <- sapply(z_indices, function(i){
    sum(drfs[[i]]$mean[idx], na.rm = TRUE)
  })
  EY_z_deaths <- mean(pred_counts, na.rm = TRUE)

  EY0_deaths <- sum(drfs[[1]]$mean[idx], na.rm = TRUE)

  diff_deaths <- EY_z_deaths - EY0_deaths

  # Death rates (per 100k per year)
  pop_sum <- sum(obs_df$Total_Pop, na.rm = TRUE)

  obs_rate <- (obs_deaths / pop_sum) * 100000 * 12

  pred_rates <- sapply(z_indices, function(i){
    (sum(drfs[[i]]$mean[idx], na.rm = TRUE) / pop_sum) * 100000 * 12
  })
  EY_z_rate <- mean(pred_rates, na.rm = TRUE)

  EY0_rate <- (EY0_deaths / pop_sum) * 100000 * 12

  rr_rate <- EY_z_rate / EY0_rate

  tibble(
    Exposure = label,
    person_yrs = person_yrs,

    # Deaths
    deaths_obs   = obs_deaths,
    deaths_EYz   = EY_z_deaths,
    deaths_EY0   = EY0_deaths,
    deaths_diff  = diff_deaths,

    # Rates
    rate_obs     = obs_rate,
    rate_EYz     = EY_z_rate,
    rate_EY0     = EY0_rate,
    rate_rr      = rr_rate
  )
}

# ---- indices and observed subsets ----
low_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 > 0 &
                      inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= 0.45)
low_df <- inla_df[low_idx, ]


mod_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 > 0.45 &
                      inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= 11)
mod_df <- inla_df[mod_idx, ]


hi_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 > 11)
hi_df <- inla_df[hi_idx, ]

all_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 > 0)
all_df <- inla_df[all_idx,]


# q1_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 >= 0 &
#                       inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= 0.005)
# q1_df <- inla_df[q1_idx, ]
# 
# 
# q2_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 > 0.005 &
#                       inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= 2.066)
# q2_df <- inla_df[q2_idx, ]
# 
# 
# q3_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 > 2.066 &
#                       inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= 10.97)
# q3_df <- inla_df[q3_idx, ]
# 
# 
# q4_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 > 10.97 &
#                       inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= 54.635)
# q4_df <- inla_df[q4_idx, ]
# 
# 
# q5_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 > 54.635)
# q5_df <- inla_df[q5_idx, ]



# moderate_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 >= 2 &
#                       inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 <= 11)
# moderate_obs_df <- inla_df[moderate_idx, ]
# 
# extreme_idx <- which(inla_df$cum_monthly_total_pm25_2 >= 50)
# extreme_obs_df <- inla_df[extreme_idx, ]


#Pull DRF predictions
full_data_DRFs = readRDS("full_data_drfs_NB_totalcum2_nocov_grouprw2_polyswprod_iliconfounder_ar6xgfilter_2.7.rds") #new hiearchical structure with strong shrinkage for SDI group specific rw2 random effects (lognormal SWs) + ili prevalence in PS model

# Map your scenario indices to each exposure band
# moderate_z_indices <- 4:6
# extreme_z_indices  <- 8:10
# 
# tab_df <- bind_rows(
#  summarize_exposure_row(
#    idx = moderate_idx,
#    obs_df = moderate_obs_df,
#    drfs = full_data_DRFs,
#    z_indices = moderate_z_indices,
#    label = "Moderate (2 to 11 \u03bcg/m\u00b3, 2-month accumulation)"
#  ),
#  summarize_exposure_row(
#    idx = extreme_idx,
#    obs_df = extreme_obs_df,
#    drfs = full_data_DRFs,
#    z_indices = extreme_z_indices,
#    label = "Extreme (\u2265 50 \u03bcg/m\u00b3, 2-month accumulation)"
#  )
# )

# #Remake for quintiles 
# q1 = 1:2
# q2 = 3:4
# q3 = 5:6
# q4 = 7:8
# q5 = 9:10
# 
# tab_df <- bind_rows(
#   summarize_exposure_row(
#     idx = q1_idx,
#     obs_df = q1_df,
#     drfs = full_data_DRFs,
#     z_indices = q1,
#     label = "0-20%"
#   ),
#   summarize_exposure_row(
#     idx = q2_idx,
#     obs_df = q2_df,
#     drfs = full_data_DRFs,
#     z_indices = q2,
#     label = "20-40%"
#   ),
#   summarize_exposure_row(
#     idx = q3_idx,
#     obs_df = q3_df,
#     drfs = full_data_DRFs,
#     z_indices = q3,
#     label = "40-60%"
#   ),
#   summarize_exposure_row(
#     idx = q4_idx,
#     obs_df = q4_df,
#     drfs = full_data_DRFs,
#     z_indices = q4,
#     label = "60-80%"
#   ),
#   summarize_exposure_row(
#     idx = q5_idx,
#     obs_df = q5_df,
#     drfs = full_data_DRFs,
#     z_indices = q5,
#     label = "80-100%"
#   )
# )

#Remake for quintiles 
low = 1:3
mod = 3:6
hi = 6:10
all = 2:10


tab_df <- bind_rows(
  summarize_exposure_row(
    idx = low_idx,
    obs_df = low_df,
    drfs = full_data_DRFs,
    z_indices = low,
    label = "0-33%"
  ),
  summarize_exposure_row(
    idx = mod_idx,
    obs_df = mod_df,
    drfs = full_data_DRFs,
    z_indices = mod,
    label = "33-66%"
  ),
  summarize_exposure_row(
    idx = hi_idx,
    obs_df = hi_df,
    drfs = full_data_DRFs,
    z_indices = hi,
    label = "66-100%"
  ),
  summarize_exposure_row(
    idx = all_idx,
    obs_df = all_df,
    drfs = full_data_DRFs,
    z_indices = all,
    label = "All"
  )
)


# ---- build gt table (journal, one-column friendly) ----
gt_tab2 <- tab_df %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "Exposure") %>%

  # Column labels under the spanners
  cols_label(
    person_yrs = "Total Person-Years",
    
    deaths_obs  = "Observed",
    deaths_EYz  = html("E[Y(z)]"),
    deaths_EY0  = html("E[Y(0)]"),
    deaths_diff = html("Difference"),

    rate_obs    = "Observed",
    rate_EYz    = html("E[Y(z)]"),
    rate_EY0    = html("E[Y(0)]"),
    rate_rr     = html("Risk Ratio")
  ) %>%

  # Spanners
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Deaths",
    columns = c(deaths_obs, deaths_EYz, deaths_EY0, deaths_diff)
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(
    label = html("Death rate (per 100k per year)"),
    columns = c(rate_obs, rate_EYz, rate_EY0, rate_rr)
  ) %>%

  # Formatting
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(deaths_obs, deaths_EYz, deaths_EY0, deaths_diff),
    decimals = 0
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = c(rate_obs, rate_EYz, rate_EY0),
    decimals = 1
  ) %>%
  fmt_number(
    columns = rate_rr,
    decimals = 3
  ) %>%

  cols_align(align = "center", columns = everything()) %>%
  cols_align(align = "left", columns = stub()) %>%

  # One-column, journal-ish styling
  tab_options(
    table.width = pct(100),
    table.font.size = px(10),
    heading.title.font.size = px(11),
    column_labels.font.size = px(10),
    row_group.font.size = px(10),
    data_row.padding = px(2),
    column_labels.padding = px(2),
    table.border.top.style = "solid",
    table.border.bottom.style = "solid"
  ) %>%

  # If you want a simple title like the sample:
  tab_header(
    title = md("**Observed versus expected mortality (count and rate) under low, moderate, and extreme smoke exposure**")
  ) %>%

  tab_source_note(
    source_note = md("Deaths: difference is E[Y(z)] − E[Y(0)]. Rates: risk ratio is E[Y(z)] / E[Y(0)]. Rates are computed per 100k per year using the exposure-specific population denominator.")
  )

gt_tab2

#gtsave(gt_tab2, "exposure-quintile-causal-table.tex",path = "/home/jovyan/work/important-plots/")
```

### Major wildfire case study (didn't end up including)

```{r,eval=FALSE}
mendocino_fire_counties = c("Colusa","Glenn","Lake","Mendocino")
camp_fire_counties = "Butte"
tubbs_fire_counties = c("Napa","Sonoma")
valley_fire_counties = c("Napa","Sonoma","Lake")
  
#MENDOCINO FIRE CASE STUDY (7/18-11/18)
mendocino_fire_smoke = inla_df %>% filter(NAME %in% mendocino_fire_counties,
  date >= as.Date("2018-05-01") & date <= as.Date("2018-11-01")) %>%
  select(NAME,date,monthly_total_pm25,cum_monthly_total_pm25_2,deaths,death_rate)

mendocino_fire_smoke
```

Colusa went from 56-214 (730 in Aug), Glenn went from 37-235 (843 in Aug), Lake went from 83-370 (1157 in Aug), Mendocino went from 4-111 (465 in Aug)

```{r,eval=FALSE}
#Load latest potential outcome predictions
full_data_DRFs = readRDS("full_data_drfs_NB_totalcum2_nocov_polyswprod_ar6xgfilter_groupint_12.9.rds") #strong shrinkage

mendocino_fire_z0 = full_data_DRFs[[1]] %>% filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties,
                                                date >= as.Date("2018-07-01") & date <= as.Date("2018-11-01"))

mendocino_fire_colusa_z1 = full_data_DRFs[[9]] %>% filter(county == "Colusa",
                                                date >= as.Date("2018-07-01") & date <= as.Date("2018-11-01"))

mendocino_fire_glenn_z1 = full_data_DRFs[[9]] %>% filter(county == "Glenn",
                                                date >= as.Date("2018-07-01") & date <= as.Date("2018-11-01"))

mendocino_fire_lake_z1 = full_data_DRFs[[10]] %>% filter(county == "Lake",
                                                date >= as.Date("2018-07-01") & date <= as.Date("2018-11-01"))

mendocino_fire_mendocino_z1 = full_data_DRFs[[9]] %>% filter(county == "Mendocino",
                                                date >= as.Date("2018-07-01") & date <= as.Date("2018-11-01"))
```

```{r,eval=FALSE}
test10 = estimate_AGTE_bycounty_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,332.541,0,"difference")
test10[[1]] %>% filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties)
test10[[2]] %>% filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties)

test10.2 = estimate_AGTE_bycounty_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,332.541,0,"ratio")
test10.2[[1]] %>% filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties)
test10.2[[2]] %>% filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties)
```

```{r,eval=FALSE}
test9 = estimate_AGTE_bycounty_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,152.893,0,"difference")
test9[[1]] %>% filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties)
test9[[2]] %>% filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties)

test9.2 = estimate_AGTE_bycounty_with_ci(bootstrapped_DRFs,inla_df,152.893,0,"ratio")
test9.2[[1]] %>% filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties)
test9.2[[2]] %>% filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties)
```

Colusa went from 56-214 (730 in Aug), Glenn went from 37-235 (843 in Aug), Lake went from 83-370 (1157 in Aug), Mendocino went from 4-111 (465 in Aug)

```{r,eval=FALSE}
mendocino_fire_counties = c("Colusa","Glenn","Lake","Mendocino")

# County-specific smoke increases (from 0 to these values)
county_exposures <- tibble(
  county = c("Colusa","Glenn","Lake","Mendocino"),
  z1_level = c(152.893, 152.893, 332.541, 152.893), #rounded from 158, 198, 287, 107
  exposure_label = c("56→214", "37→235", "83→370","4→111"),
  cum_exposure_label = c("59→270", "40→272", "83→453","4→115"),
  deaths = c("0→0", "0→0", "4→2", "2→2"),
  death_rate = c("0→0", "0→0", "6.235580→3.117790", "2.287754→2.287754")
)

# --- 1) County summary statistics ---
county_summary <- inla_df %>%
  filter(NAME %in% mendocino_fire_counties,
         date >= as.Date("2018-07-01") & date <= as.Date("2018-11-01")) %>% 
  group_by(NAME) %>%
  summarize(
    total_pop = mean(Total_Pop, na.rm = TRUE),  # or first() if constant
    avg_sdi = mean(SDI, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  ) %>% 
  rename(county = NAME)

# --- 2) Extract ADRF values for z=0 from each test ---
# z=0 is the same for all counties, so we can take from any test
adrf_z0 <- test9[[1]] %>%
  filter(county %in% mendocino_fire_counties) %>%
  select(county, mu_hat_z0, rate_hat_z0)

# --- 3) Extract county-specific z=1 values from appropriate tests ---
adrf_colusa <- test9[[1]] %>%
  filter(county == "Colusa") %>%
  select(county, mu_hat_z1, rate_hat_z1)

adrf_glenn <- test9[[1]] %>%
  filter(county == "Glenn") %>%
  select(county, mu_hat_z1, rate_hat_z1)

adrf_lake <- test10[[1]] %>%
  filter(county == "Lake") %>%
  select(county, mu_hat_z1, rate_hat_z1)

adrf_mendocino <- test9[[1]] %>%
  filter(county == "Mendocino") %>%
  select(county, mu_hat_z1, rate_hat_z1)

# Combine z=1 values
adrf_z1 <- bind_rows(adrf_colusa, adrf_glenn, adrf_lake, adrf_mendocino)

# Merge z=0 and z=1
adrf_df <- adrf_z0 %>%
  left_join(adrf_z1 %>% select(county, mu_hat_z1, rate_hat_z1), by = "county")

# --- 4) Extract AGTE difference values ---
agte_diff_colusa <- test9[[2]] %>%
  filter(county == "Colusa", type == "difference") %>%
  select(county, agte_mu_hat, agte_mu_lower, agte_mu_upper)

agte_diff_glenn <- test9[[2]] %>%
  filter(county == "Glenn", type == "difference") %>%
  select(county, agte_mu_hat, agte_mu_lower, agte_mu_upper)

agte_diff_lake <- test10[[2]] %>%
  filter(county == "Lake", type == "difference") %>%
  select(county, agte_mu_hat, agte_mu_lower, agte_mu_upper)

agte_diff_mendocino <- test9[[2]] %>%
  filter(county == "Mendocino", type == "difference") %>%
  select(county, agte_mu_hat, agte_mu_lower, agte_mu_upper)

agte_diff_df <- bind_rows(agte_diff_colusa, agte_diff_glenn, agte_diff_lake, agte_diff_mendocino)

# --- 5) Extract AGTE ratio values ---
agte_ratio_colusa <- test9.2[[2]] %>%
  filter(county == "Colusa", type == "ratio") %>%
  select(county, agte_rate_hat, agte_rate_lower, agte_rate_upper)

agte_ratio_glenn <- test9.2[[2]] %>%
  filter(county == "Glenn", type == "ratio") %>%
  select(county, agte_rate_hat, agte_rate_lower, agte_rate_upper)

agte_ratio_lake <- test10.2[[2]] %>%
  filter(county == "Lake", type == "ratio") %>%
  select(county, agte_rate_hat, agte_rate_lower, agte_rate_upper)

agte_ratio_mendocino <- test9.2[[2]] %>%
  filter(county == "Mendocino", type == "ratio") %>%
  select(county, agte_rate_hat, agte_rate_lower, agte_rate_upper)

agte_ratio_df <- bind_rows(agte_ratio_colusa, agte_ratio_glenn, agte_ratio_lake, agte_ratio_mendocino)

# --- 6) Join all data ---
table_df <- county_summary %>%
  left_join(county_exposures, by = "county") %>%
  left_join(adrf_df, by = "county") %>%
  left_join(agte_diff_df, by = "county") %>%
  left_join(agte_ratio_df, by = "county")

# --- 7) Format with 3 decimals ---
table_df <- table_df %>%
  mutate(
    total_pop_fmt = comma(round(total_pop)),
    sdi = round(avg_sdi, 0),
    mu0 = round(mu_hat_z0, 1),
    mu1 = round(mu_hat_z1, 1),
    rate0 = round(rate_hat_z0, 2),
    rate1 = round(rate_hat_z1, 2),
    diff_est = round(agte_mu_hat, 1),
    diff_ci = if_else(!is.na(agte_mu_lower),
                      paste0(diff_est, " (",
                             round(agte_mu_lower, 1), ", ",
                             round(agte_mu_upper, 1), ")"),
                      NA_character_),
    rate_est = round(agte_rate_hat, 2),
    rate_ci = if_else(!is.na(agte_rate_lower),
                      paste0(rate_est, " (",
                             round(agte_rate_lower, 2), ", ",
                             round(agte_rate_upper, 2), ")"),
                      NA_character_)
  ) %>%
  select(county, exposure_label, cum_exposure_label, total_pop_fmt,
         sdi, deaths, death_rate, mu0, mu1, 
         diff_ci, rate0, rate1, rate_ci)

# --- 8) Create gt table ---
gt_tbl2 <- table_df %>% select(-c(exposure_label,cum_exposure_label)) %>%
  gt(rowname_col = "county") %>%
  cols_label(
    # exposure_label = html("PM<sub>2.5</sub> Change"),
    # cum_exposure_label = html("Cumulative PM<sub>2.5</sub> Change"),
    total_pop_fmt = "Population",
    sdi = "SDI",
    deaths = "Observed Change",
    mu0 = html("E[Y(0)]"),
    mu1 = html("E[Y(z<sub>1</sub>)]"),
    diff_ci = "Expected Diff (95% CI)",
    death_rate = "Observed Change",
    rate0 = html("Rate E[Y(0)]"),
    rate1 = html("Rate E[Y(z<sub>1</sub>)]"),
    rate_ci = "Risk Ratio (95% CI)"
  ) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Deaths",
              columns = c(total_pop_fmt, sdi, deaths, mu0, mu1, diff_ci)) %>%
  tab_spanner(label = "Death Rate (per 100k)",
              columns = c(death_rate, rate0, rate1, rate_ci)) %>%
  tab_header(
    title = "Mendocino Fire Impact Analysis (July 2018 - Nov 2018)",
    subtitle = "County-specific smoke exposure and mortality effects"
  ) %>%
  tab_options(
    table.font.size = "9pt",
    column_labels.font.size = "9pt",
    stub.font.size = "9pt",
    table.width = pct(100),
    data_row.padding = px(2),
    column_labels.padding = px(2)
  ) %>%
  tab_style(
    style = cell_text(size = px(9)),
    locations = cells_body()
  ) %>%
  cols_align(align = "center", columns = everything()) %>%
  cols_align(align = "left", columns = everything()) %>%
  fmt_missing(columns = everything(), missing_text = "-")

gt_tbl2
```

```{r,eval=FALSE}
latex_tbl2 <- gt_tbl2 %>% 
  as_latex()

cat(as.character(latex_tbl2))
```
